prompts.name: Bright Character
prompts.text: Create a clear character-focused image with bright soft daylight, clean background, readable outfit, expressive face, and polished detail.

prompts.name: Cozy Room
prompts.text: Create a cozy indoor character scene with warm light, soft furniture, natural posture, and inviting domestic detail.

prompts.name: Fantasy Portrait
prompts.text: Create a fantasy portrait with elegant clothing, subtle magical atmosphere, refined lighting, and expressive character presence.

prompts.name: Modern City
prompts.text: Create a modern city character scene with urban detail, natural pose, clean lighting, and strong subject separation.

prompts.name: Cyberpunk Neon
prompts.text: Create a cyberpunk scene with neon lighting, reflective surfaces, futuristic fashion, and readable subject detail.

prompts.name: Rainy Mood
prompts.text: Create a rainy atmospheric scene with wet reflections, soft gray light, readable subject lighting, and emotional mood.

prompts.name: Shrine Scene
prompts.text: Create a peaceful shrine scene with traditional architecture, stone paths, soft light, and calm character presence.

prompts.name: Cafe Scene
prompts.text: Create a café scene with warm lighting, drink props, relaxed pose, and cozy everyday charm.

prompts.name: Library Scene
prompts.text: Create a library scene with bookshelves, warm reading light, thoughtful expression, and scholarly atmosphere.

prompts.name: Full Body Outfit
prompts.text: Create a full-body image with clear outfit, footwear, accessories, pose, and simple supportive background.

prompts.name: Close Portrait
prompts.text: Create a close portrait focused on eyes, face, expression, hair detail, and soft flattering lighting.

prompts.name: Action Pose
prompts.text: Create an action pose with clear motion, readable anatomy, flowing clothing, and dynamic composition.

prompts.name: Magic Scene
prompts.text: Create a magical scene with controlled glowing effects, clear gesture, fantasy detail, and balanced lighting.

prompts.name: Nature Scene
prompts.text: Create a nature scene with greenery, soft sunlight, atmospheric depth, and peaceful character integration.

prompts.name: Editorial Character
prompts.text: Create an editorial character image with refined outfit styling, polished lighting, confident pose, and premium presentation.
